title: General Medical Care * Native American Community - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > General Medical Care * Native American Community 3 Matching Service Providers Refine Results - Select - Transgender Individuals Native American Community Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS WARM SPRINGS HEALTH AND WELLNESS CENTER WARM SPRINGS INDIAN HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers primary care, dental, optometry, specialized medical care, WIC, nutrition information, maternal and child healthcare, and a diabetes program. Also offers a mobile medical bus on the Warm Springs Reservation only. 1270 Kot-Num Road Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: Members of a federally recognized American Indian or Alaskan Native tribe or children of tribal members only Hours: -Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Firday 8am-5pm, Wednesday 1pm-5pm -Mobile medical bus schedule varies, call for location and dates (541) 553-1196 Get Directions Visit Website More Details KLAMATH TRIBES KLAMATH TRIBAL WELLNESS CENTER MEDICAL AND PHARMACY CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides general medical care including but not limited to diagnosis and treatment of illnesses/injury, infant and child exams, immunization services, podiatry services, pap smears/breast health exams, on-site labs and x-rays, information about Special Diabetes Program for Indians (SPDI), pharmacy access, and possible off-site medical referrals 330 Chiloquin Boulevard Chiloquin, OR 97624 Eligibility: Native American individuals of federally recognized tribes Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm (541) 882-1487 Get Directions Visit Website More Details YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides comprehensive physical, mental, and dental care services. Services include general exams, well-child exams, immunizations, care for illness or infections, prenatal care, comprehensive dental services, and counseling and drug and alcohol treatment services. 46314 Timine Way Pendleton, OR 97801 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-5pm Email (541) 966-9830 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CONFEDERATED TRIBES OF WARM SPRINGS WARM SPRINGS INDIAN HEALTH CENTER KLAMATH TRIBES MEDICAL AND PHARMACY CLINIC YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER YELLOWHAWK TRIBAL HEALTH CENTER
